mapper.sql: feedback_id, ticket_id, target_type, target_id, feedback_value, adopted, comment, evaluator_id, create_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ticket_ai_feedback (ticket_id, target_type, target_id, feedback_value, adopted, comment, evaluator_id, create_time) VALUES (#{ticketId}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{feedbackValue}, #{adopted}, #{comment}, #{evaluatorId}, #{createTime})
